familyRules: Spouse naturalisation permitted under Article 19 on identical terms. Dependants may be included but are processed separately: approximately 2-3 months for their citizenship approval, after which they must travel to Serbia. Per-dependant pricing bands: not shown.

routes.name: Citizenship by Merit (Company incorporation and donation)
routes.notes: RESTRICTED / BY-EXCEPTION: the route is described as only open to high-profile individuals with a clean criminal record (citizenship by exception/merit under Article 19 of the Law on Citizenship). Physical presence REQUIRED: two mandatory visits to Belgrade (3-5 days initially, then 5-7 days after approval). Breakdown: contribution EUR 172,500 + government fees EUR 177,500 + CitizenX fee EUR 25,000 = EUR 375,000 (reconciles exactly). Includes legal representation, 24/7 concierge, company incorporation costs and first-year maintenance (accounting). The non-refundable government contribution is included in the total. NOTE: CitizenX's /insights/serbian-citizenship-investment article describes a SEPARATE real-estate residency-to-citizenship path (no formal CBI, ~6 years to naturalisation) which is a different route and not priced here.

uncertain: Status modelled as 'open' but is effectively by-exception only (high-profile applicants, clean record) - not a standard open CBI programme.
Due diligence fee per adult: not shown (no separate DD line item).
Family/dependant pricing bands: not shown - dependants processed separately, cost increments behind interactive quote.
Single-sourced pricing (the /serbia programme page); breakdown reconciles to the cent (172,500 + 177,500 + 25,000 = 375,000) which supports accuracy.
